name: Cranberry - Rasberry Meringue Pie
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup frozen cranberry-raspberry juice cocktail, thawed
Frozen 9-inch pie shell, baked according to package instructions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the sugar, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Whisk in the egg yolks until combined.
3. Stir in the thawed cranberry-raspberry juice cocktail and water until well mixed.
4. Add the butter and lemon juice, stirring until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into the baked pie shell.
6. Bake according to package instructions for meringue topping (usually low temperature).
7. Let cool completely before serving.
